_doc: RUNE BSC Testnet QuickNode Stream config. Either copy fields manually into the QuickNode console UI, or POST this body (after base64-encoding `filter.code`) to https://api.quicknode.com/streams/rest/v1/streams with header `x-api-key: <your QuickNode API key>`.
name: rune-testnet-events
description: RUNE Community.EventAddReferrer + NodePresell.EventNodePresell on BSC testnet (chainId 97). Ships filtered logs to the testnet preview-branch Supabase Edge Function.
_dataset_note: Same as mainnet — UI may say 'Logs' but we want receipt-shaped payload (status + nested logs).

start._note: Matches `chain.ts` testnet startBlock — public BSC testnet RPCs only retain ~50-100k blocks of history, anchor inside that window.

batch._note: Single block per message — same low-latency choice as mainnet.

_latest_block_delay_note: Same as mainnet — 3-block delay matches api-server indexer CONFIRMATIONS, ~9s extra latency for reorg safety.
_restream_on_reorg_note: Same as mainnet — safe to enable, dupes ignored by upsert.

filter._note: Differences vs mainnet: CHAIN_ID = 97, two contract addresses are testnet's. Topic hashes are identical (event signatures don't change between deployments).

hmac._secret_note: Set as `QUICKNODE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` in the testnet Supabase preview branch. Already done — verify with `supabase secrets list --project-ref tqexhkajljyecsacmyyy`.

_verify_steps: 1. Save Stream → status should turn Active within ~30s.
2. QuickNode console → Stream → 'Logs' tab: 200 + `{"ok":true,...}` per delivery. Empty blocks → no delivery.
3. Verify in DB: `psql 'postgresql://postgres:one2317888!!@db.tqexhkajljyecsacmyyy.supabase.co:5432/postgres' -c "SELECT count(*) FROM rune_referrers WHERE chain_id=97"`.
4. If 401: secret mismatch in HMAC field.
_separation_note: DO NOT cross-wire — testnet Stream MUST point at testnet Supabase URL; mainnet Stream MUST point at mainnet URL. Otherwise testnet events land in mainnet DB (or vice-versa) and corrupt analytics.
